3:{"step_index":313,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-05-25T13:22:14Z","thi
nking":"**Reviewing Asset Implementation**\n\nI'm focusing now on implementing the Asset Management view, specifically 
`views/asset.js`. The goal is to replicate the provided screenshot accurately. I'm starting by reviewing the HTML, 
CSS, and component structure, paying close attention to the KPI Cards, which are a key element.\n\n\n**Analyzing KPI 
Card Design**\n\nI'm now diving deep into the visual breakdown of the KPI cards, focusing on an exact pixel-perfect 
replication. I've broken down each card's components, including text labels and associated icons. I'm focusing on the 
colors used for the numeric values, and noticed we have color CSS classes ready to go, such as `card-blue`, 
`card-green`, etc. I'm taking notes on how to best implement these, making sure to match the screenshot 
precisely.\n\n\n**Defining Color Applications**\n\nI've specified the exact CSS for number colors within the KPI 
cards, directly mapping them to the `.kpi-stat` elements as standard blue, green, and red. The goal is precise 
alignment with the provided screenshot's visual presentation. I'm now documenting the table details, including its 
header and column structure, and defining the specific status badge colors and visual appearance. I'm noting the color 
codes to apply directly to the status indicators within the table.\n\n\n","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":
{"ArtifactMetadata":"{\"ArtifactType\":\"other\",\"RequestFeedback\":false,\"Summary\":\"Created views/asset.js 
implementing the Asset Management dashboard with dynamic KPI cards, high-fidelity table rows, a creation modal, and 
interactive edit controls.\"}","CodeContent":"\"// views/asset.js\\n// Renders the Asset Management application 
dashboard\\n\\nfunction renderAsset(container, state, navigateTo) {\\n  // Inject scoped styles for Asset 
Management\\n  const styleId = 'asset-view-styles';\\n  let styleEl = document.getElementById(styleId);\\n  if 
(!styleEl) {\\n    styleEl = document.createElement('style');\\n    styleEl.id = styleId;\\n    styleEl.innerHTML = 
`\\n      .asset-view {\\n        animation: fadeIn var(--transition-normal) ease-in-out;\\n      }\\n      \\n      
.asset-status-checked-out {\\n        background-color: #0b0f19;\\n        color: #ffffff;\\n        padding: 4px 
10px;\\n        border-radius: 20px;\\n        font-weight: 600;\\n        font-size: 0.75rem;\\n        display: 
inline-block;\\n        text-align: center;\\n      }\\n      [data-theme=\\\"dark\\\"] .asset-status-checked-out {\\n 
       background-color: #ffffff;\\n        color: #0b0f19;\\n      }\\n\\n      .asset-status-available {\\n        
background-color: var(--bg-secondary);\\n        color: var(--text-secondary);\\n        border: 1px solid 
var(--border-color);\\n        padding: 3px 9px;\\n        border-radius: 20px;\\n        font-weight: 600;\\n        
font-size: 0.75rem;\\n        display: inline-block;\\n        text-align: center;\\n      }\\n\\n      
.asset-status-overdue {\\n        background-color: hsl(var(--color-red));\\n        color: #ffffff;\\n        
padding: 4px 10px;\\n        border-radius: 20px;\\n        font-weight: 600;\\n        font-size: 0.75rem;\\n        
display: inline-block;\\n        text-align: center;\\n      }\\n\\n      .asset-row-clickable {\\n        cursor: 
pointer;\\n        transition: background-color var(--transition-fast);\\n      }\\n\\n      
.asset-row-clickable:hover {\\n        background-color: var(--bg-secondary);\\n      }\\n    `;\\n    
document.head.appendChild(styleEl);\\n  }\\n\\n  // Calculate dynamic KPI counters with offsets to match initial 
numbers (124 Total, 98 Checked Out, 18 Available, 8 Overdue)\\n  const checkedOutCount = 94 + state.assets.filter(a => 
a.status === 'Checked Out').length;\\n \n<truncated 15953 bytes>","Description":"\"Created the views/asset.js 
dashboard script for Asset Management incorporating dynamic counter offset math, asset inventory tables, and CRUD 
operations for managing hardware assets.\"","IsArtifact":"false","Overwrite":"true","TargetFile":"\"C:\\\\Users\\\\DELL
\\\\.gemini\\\\antigravity\\\\scratch\\\\master-construction-portal\\\\views\\\\asset.js\"","toolAction":"\"Creating 
the views/asset.js view module\"","toolSummary":"\"Create views/asset.js\""}}]}
